content:
🔥 Snapframe | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Generating professional app store screenshots with customizable templates and device mockups.
✨ Key Features: • Professional Templates • Device Frames • Per-Slide Theming • Dynamic Text Blocks • Real-time Preview
📖 Summary: Snapframe is a web-based screenshot builder that allows app developers and designers to easily create professional, marketing-ready screenshots for app stores. It offers templates, device frames, dynamic text, and real-time previews, with a unique JSON editor for programmatic creation and AI-assisted workflows.
